title: Regarding Asuka Kaji and the Opening
display_title: Regarding Asuka Kaji and the Opening
wikitext:
[]: Regarding Asuka, Kaji, and the Opening             Quote Post by insan3soldiern » Fri Aug 01, 2014 8:41 am Something I have always been curious about, but never asked for whatever reason is: were Asuka and Kaiji always in the OP when the series originally aired or were they added into it when episode 8 or 9 aired? This is a general question, but I'm hoping someone who is familiar with the series' original run in Japan could tell me.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Fri Aug 01, 2014 9:18 am I don't remember if they added Asuka and Kaji after Ep. 8 but you should watch the Ep. 8 to be sure.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Aug 01, 2014 9:18 am Somewhere I read (I think it was one of the Platinum-booklets), that Anno originally intended to alter the opening cuts as the series went along. But he ditched the idea, because it was an effort too time-consuming. So as far as I am informed the opening did never change one cut. Also, you have Kaworu in there too for a fraction of a second, so I guess Anno already planned Asuka's and Kaji's appearance from the beginning. Correct me, if I'm wrong.

[]: Re: Regarding Asuka, Kaiji, and the Opening             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Fri Aug 01, 2014 9:54 am insan3soldiern wrote: Something I have always been curious about, but never asked for whatever reason is: were Asuka and Kaiji always in the OP when the series originally aired or were they added into it when episode 8 or 9 aired? This is a general question, but I'm hoping someone who is familiar with the series' original run in Japan could tell me.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Aug 01, 2014 9:59 am There was only one other version of the OP, and it was the full 4 minute long version edited by Masayuki that was featured in a cut of DEATH, possibly only on laser disc if I remember correctly. But as for the OP that aired on Television and is featured in all of the DVDs, there was only ever one version of it. No alterations. Just goes to show you that GAINAX had at least that much set in stone in the Evangelion Proposal before going into further development in each episode production. But also note that there are moments that don’t appear in the TV series in the same way they appear in in the OP, such as Shinji abandoning Eva Unit 01. (And really, it’s quite remarkable that even then there are strong similarities. Just goes to show you that these guys planned things out before production it.)

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Sat Aug 02, 2014 8:00 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: But as for the OP that aired on Television and is featured in all of the DVDs, there was only ever one version of it. No alterations.

[]:             Quote Post by insan3soldiern » Sun Aug 03, 2014 6:58 pm I see, thanks for the replies guys. It makes sense to me now why Asuka doesn't feel all that "prevalent" in the OP, despite being one of the most important characters in the series. Maybe Anno and the team didn't realize what kind of role she'd have at the time, though her and Rei being to the left and right of Shinji at the start of the OP does kind of suggest otherwise she's barely seen compared to Misato and Rei. Btw, I'm curious about something else. After Misato is first shown in the OP and as Rei is shown looking out a window, is that Misato or Asuka who is shown? You know, the shadow outlined girl/woman who is sitting with her knees up? I never could tell.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sun Aug 03, 2014 7:16 pm insan3soldiern wrote: Btw, I'm curious about something else. After Misato is first shown in the OP and as Rei is shown looking out a window, is that Misato or Asuka who is shown? You know, the shadow outlined girl/woman who is sitting with her knees up? I never could tell.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Aug 03, 2014 8:31 pm https://wiki.evageeks.org/FGC:OP_A#004d

[]:             Quote Post by insan3soldiern » Mon Aug 04, 2014 2:56 pm Ornette wrote: https://wiki.evageeks.org/FGC:OP_A#004d

[]: the opening             Quote Post by strawhatpatriot » Thu Aug 14, 2014 9:41 pm I have a question (albeit slightly differently from the topic at hand, but it still has to do with the opening) that I didn't think would need a full thread... unless it does... At the very end of the opening, we see Shinji smile like this: I'm sure people know that it's similar to his smile at the end of the series, right? What I'm wondering is, how? Didn't they come up with the last 10 or so episodes on the spot, due to time and budget constraints (along with Anno's state of mind and interest in psychology)? Unless they just randomly put that in the opening, and then, during the ending of the series, decided "hey lets use that"? So as a result, this isn't a big deal?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Aug 14, 2014 10:12 pm It's re-used cells. Most of the last 2 episodes are all re-used cells.

[]:             Quote Post by strawhatpatriot » Fri Aug 15, 2014 9:42 pm Ornette wrote: It's re-used cells. Most of the last 2 episodes are all re-used cells.

This is a general question, but I'm hoping someone who is familiar with the series' original run in Japan could tell
